title: Fix UI issues (iteration 1)
description: Fix failing E2E tests by updating UI or test code

testResults.feedback: 2 tests fail because UI formats amounts as currency ($1,000.00) but tests check for plain numbers (1000, 3000, 500, 2500). Fix tests to match formatted amounts: use to_contain_text('1,000') instead of to_contain_text('1000'), and to_contain_text('3,000') instead of to_contain_text('3000'), etc.
